title: Allow restraint to carry rising pressure

messages.text: Teal'c remained watchful and characteristically restrained while Will described the portal.

pendingUserMessage: Will insists the fake gate is useless and he alone can send them home.

editorialRedirect.sourceResponse: Teal'c launched into an angry speech and threatened Will until every patron turned to stare.
editorialRedirect.replacementObjective: Keep the trust pressure visible through evidence-supported restraint in the public diner.
requiredBeats: Teal'c's response or deliberate silence communicates scrutiny without forced aggression.
forbiddenSourceBeats: Invent an angry public threat or mandatory speech for Teal'c.
